name: Eneco Refresh Limited
summary: Eneco Refresh Limited produces and distributes bottled water and filtration systems in Australia. It also rents water coolers; and distributes filtration systems and water purifiers. In addition, the company produces and distributes plastic molded products, including containers and jars, bottles, gardening products, automotive parts, and toys. Further, it supplies one-way kegs under the Petainer name for the beer, cider, and wine industry, as well as distributes hydrogen gas. The company was formerly known as Refresh Group Limited. Eneco Refresh Limited was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Malaga, Australia.
